name: Hawaiian Cake
recipeIngredient: 18 1/4 ozs Duncan Hines® Moist Deluxe White Cake Mix
1/4 cup maraschino cherries, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 13 x 9 inches pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
3. Prepare cake mix according to package directions.
4. Pour the prepared cake mix into the prepared pan.
5. Bake for 15 minutes or until done.
6. Meanwhile, prepare vanilla pudding according to package directions.
7. Add cream cheese and whipped topping to the vanilla pudding.
8. Spread over the cooled cake.
9. Sprinkle with drained pineapple over the pudding mixture.
10. Then, sprinkle with cherries, walnuts, and coconut.
